name: Steel Flanger
explanation: An extreme, metallic jet-engine flanger. A swept short delay with strong regeneration drives the comb filter into clangy, almost-pitched stainless resonance. A triangle LFO sweeps a fractional delay around a Manual base position over a very wide range, while bipolar Feedback intensifies the metallic ring (positive) or hollows it out (negative through-zero hiss). A soft saturator inside the feedback path keeps the resonance bounded but aggressive. Controls: Rate, Depth, Manual, Feedback and dry/wet Mix.
